projects.name: Tomato
projects.short_description: Minimalist, data-oriented pomodoro timer for Android
projects.description: Tomato is a minimalist, data-oriented pomodoro timer app for Android with deep insights about your productivity

projects.name: Wikireader
projects.short_description: Android app for reading Wikipedia pages distraction-free
projects.description: A lightweight Android app for reading Wikipedia articles distraction-free. Supports light mode, dark mode, Material You dynamic colors and 300+ Wikipedia languages

projects.name: SimplyGraph
projects.description: SimplyGraph is a simple, fast graphing calculator for Android with support for explicit functions, implicit relations, polar functions and parametric relations

form.question: How to support
form.response: You can support me on BuyMeACoffee at https://coff.ee/nsh07 and on GitHub Sponsors at https://github.com/sponsors/nsh07 . Or, you can contribute code or translations on my projects.

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response:
- Tomato: Minimalist, data-oriented pomodoro timer for Android
- Wikireader: Android app for reading Wikipedia pages distraction-free
- SimplyGraph: A graphing calculator for Android

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: Learn Git/VCS in general, in-depth. It will save you a lot of time later.

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: FOSS has helped me a lot in my computer and programming journey. Writing and maintaining FOSS projects is my way of giving back to the open-source community what it has provided me with.

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
What's your open-source villain origin story?
form.response: I fixed a typo in [btop](https://github.com/aristocratos/btop), and now I'm in their contributor list 😈

form.question: If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
